title: HARM REDUCTION PROGRAM - 211info
text: BENTON COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH HARM REDUCTION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides syringe exchange services, injectable naloxone and fentanyl test strips, and peer support for substance abuse. 530 NW 27th Street Corvallis, OR 97330 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday 8am-8pm, Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 8am-5pm, Wednesday 8am-7pm; closed on holidays Email (541) 766-6314 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Message Phone (541) 766-6314 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or email for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Benton County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located at the Benton County Sunset Building Services: Needle Exchange and Injection Supplies Opioid Antidote Distribution Peer Mental Health Support Services * Substance Use Disorder Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON MOTHERSCARE HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABIES FIRST! INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CACOON INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILY CONNECTS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HIV CASE MANAGEMENT PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM PUBLIC HEALTH - COMMUNICABLE DISEASE PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BENTON COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH
